calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,300p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281699 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73281699 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281699 --event evt-petition-disposition; find data/cases/scotus/73281699 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73281699/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt; sed -n '1,240p' data

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,950p' data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,1025p' data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":60000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '360,900p' data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,620p' data/cases/scotus/73281699/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|2025|paid|Paid|Third|3d Cir|originating circuit|Pennsylvania\" metrics/statpack.md | head -160; sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '135,240p' metrics/statpack.md; jq '.cert_by_term // .terms // .scotus_cert_by_term // keys' metrics/statpack.json 2>/dev/null | head -100; rg -n 'salience|fee_class|Paid|paid' metrics/statpack.json | head -80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":15000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"salience\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -300","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation 'Republican Party of Minnesota v. White' --citation 'Williams-Yulee v. Florida Bar' --citation 'Pickering v. Board of Education' --era 2020s --limit 12","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const rs = await Promise.all([
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"Disciplinary Counsel v. Rudduck", filed_before:"2026-07-17", num_results:5, fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","opinions"]}),
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"Disciplinary Counsel v. Grendell", filed_before:"2026-07-17", num_results:5, fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","opinions"]}),
  tools.mc
